items.title: EU court adviser says banks must immediately refund phishing victims
top_recommendations: Run targeted awareness for users most likely to be impacted by the described phishing templates.
Review MFA policies and disable legacy authentication protocols (POP/IMAP/SMTP basic auth and other non‑MFA flows).

items.title: Hackers abuse .arpa DNS and ipv6 to evade phishing defenses
top_recommendations: Verify whether the impacted service, vendor, or product is used inside your organization.
Assess the need to rotate passwords, keys, and tokens associated with the affected service.

items.title: Termite ransomware breaches linked to ClickFix CastleRAT attacks
top_recommendations: Validate the integrity and recoverability of recent backups for all critical systems.
Review exposed RDP/VPN entry points and restrict access using MFA and network segmentation.

items.title: Microsoft: Hackers abusing AI at every stage of cyberattacks
top_recommendations: Run an out-of-band malware scan on servers and endpoints, focusing on recent changes.
Collect suspicious binaries from Temp/AppData and submit them to a sandbox or reverse engineering pipeline.
